releaseNotes:
• Image generation — API or local models, zero setup
• Model name/logo shown on every reply
• Multi-step replies now render as one message, with a live "what's happening" indicator
• A "Thinking" dropdown for models that use real reasoning (DeepSeek-R1, QwQ, etc.)
• "Always allow tool calls" — skip confirmation for code execution and plugin calls
• Local API Server — run a local OpenAI-compatible server other tools can connect to
• Fixed a stray line in the sidebar; fixed local image models that failed with "does not support chat"
